abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Breathing in the Chemicals
abilities.text: The area within 3" of this model is hazardous, concealing terrain. Friendly models may ignore this terrain.

abilities.name: Extended Reach
abilities.text: Enemy models within 2" cannot take attack actions generated by the Charge action.

actions.name: Blighted Fog
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)2" or "(gun)10".
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, enemy models within (x)1" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Prey on Nothingness
triggers.text: When resolving, this model may remove a token from the target. If it does so, deal +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Mass Hysteria
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 3".

triggers.name: Blast
triggers.text: When resolving, deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target.

actions.name: Disorienting Fog
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4". This model may remove a friendly token from the target to increase the distance moved by +2".

actions.name: Caustic Spray
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Always More Rats
triggers.text: This trigger can only be declared if a Tunnel Rats model was hired by this crew. Summon a Tunnel Rats within range.
